title: webhook — scheduled tasks
description: Three entries: daily probe, daily prune, hourly rotation-grace cleanup.

entries.name: webhook-probe
entries.purpose: Daily 06:00 UTC health probe of every active subscription. Detects broken integrations before they cause real delivery failures.

entries.name: webhook-prune
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC retention prune of WebhookDelivery rows past prune_after_days. Off-peak window minimises DB load.

entries.name: webhook-rotation-grace-cleanup
entries.purpose: Every hour at :15: clear secret_previous + secret_previous_expires_at on subscriptions where the grace window has passed. Reduces attack surface + audit noise.
